final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing UI design system mockup showcasing a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls in a classic minimal tech style.

Style/medium: UI design system sheet, classic minimal tech aesthetic, dark-mode flat illustration with sharp geometric precision
Composition: multi-panel layout — web Dashboard panel (top, wide), mobile interface panel (mid-left), component library panel (mid-right) showing cards / buttons / toggles / sliders / input fields, all panels arranged on a deep dark canvas with subtle grid
Subject: web Dashboard with data charts, KPI cards, nav sidebar; mobile interface with app screens; component library with buttons (primary / secondary / ghost), cards (elevated with glow border), toggles, sliders, badges, input controls
Scene/backdrop: deep dark background (#0A0C10 range), subtle dot-grid or fine-line grid overlay, floating panel depth via layered shadows
Lighting/mood: cool blue and cyan accent glow on interactive elements, high contrast between dark surface and bright UI components, layered depth with soft neon rim lighting on cards
Color palette: deep charcoal / near-black base, electric blue (#00AAFF range) and cyan (#00FFD1 range) as primary accents, white and light-gray typography, occasional purple accent for secondary highlights
Materials/textures: frosted glass cards (glassmorphism panels), sharp-edge flat buttons, fine hairline dividers, subtle gradient fills on chart bars
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: all UI components must be clearly legible and visually distinct; hierarchy must read from Dashboard → mobile → component detail; tech aesthetic must feel premium not garish
Avoid: cartoon or illustrative style, warm color palette, cluttered layout, generic flat-design without depth, oversaturated rainbow colors
